name: createStore
description: Creates a store with state management capabilities
examples: const { set, get, use, subscribe } = createStore((set) => ({ count: 0, increment: () => set(state => ({ count: state.count + 1 })) }));

parameters.name: createState
parameters.description: - Function that initializes the store state

source.source: * @param {StateCreator<Value>} createState - Function that initializes the store state

tokens.name: createState
tokens.description: - Function that initializes the store state

returns.description: Object containing store methods and hook for accessing state

source.source: * @returns {StoreApi<Value>} - Object containing store methods and hook for accessing state
